svg.text: Laundry nook networking envelope — widened cabinet + tower trolley options
All dimensions in mm. Plan controls: nominal nook width 1040, room depth 1650, ceiling 2590.
PLAN VIEW: 1040 mm wall segment × 1650 mm laundry depth
• Cart height values include a 50 mm gap below the wall cabinet.
• 150 mm top clearance is a tight active-vent target; 200 mm is better for heat and cable escape.
• 600W cabinets are common/cheap. 752W wide cabinets exist; 800W is a realistic custom/import envelope.
• 900W is possible geometrically but not recommended after plaster, door/trim tolerance and side airflow.
best as two shelves, not side-by-side
9U 600W × 450D × 510H; trolley ≤1880H; easiest to source; more side clearance.
6U wide/custom ~752–800W × 550D × 370H; trolley ≤2020H, but rack space is tight.
Use a 900–980W cart; 450D if towers are sideways; 600D if mixed; 700D only if front-facing tower access dominates.
